items.creator: @BBoyoko
items.title:
R to @guy_assy: Mais ton prof pasteur a dit qu' en 2022 ou 2023 que les USA avait atteint un taux de Refi ou directeur de 25%, c'est par là où le mensonge se cache,  mais le prof VK voulant le conseiller que les USA en ces années là les taux directeurs étaient de 4,5 à 5%, qui dit vrai?
C'est VK

items.title:
RT by @BradleyOpitz: To the people who think mortgage rates are done falling.

It looks like they’re just getting started.

And the periods when they rise just create new (refi) opportunities later.

items.creator: @hendry_hugh
items.title:
RT by @spunjgrip: Goldilocks. That bitch gonna bite your ass...

The Paradox of The Economic Condition

- The U.S. economy ain't gonna lose its momentum

- The ten-year can't trade above 5%

- The international situation gonna pull rates down

The stymie transmitted by the impending refi boom gonna buoy the household sector

Great minds will never allocate to treasuries under this scenario

But yields will fall...

The detonator is the financial system? The unwind of the short treasury carry trade that funded the MASS of the Mag-7. The reflexive unwind, lower highs, slow at first, the deceleration in price momentum, the reluctance of the credit system to offer new dollars for speculative endeavor, the reversal higher in the dollar. 

The cogs of the gear change. Slow at first, then really fast

The future always sounds crazy-impossible on your first encounter with it but I'm seeing things...

And if I'm wrong, $BTC gone trade much higher

I just love the long form talk with @levenson_david over on substack and patreon 👉 https://linktr.ee/acidcapitalist
